metadata.description: Slash commands for driving Claude Code from Claude Code.

plugins.name: claw-drive
plugins.description: Slash commands for driving Claude Code from Claude Code: /claw-drive-init, /claw-drive-start, /claw-drive-resolve. Pairs with the claw-drive CLI; install via curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/renatodarrigo/claw-drive/main/install.sh | bash.
